title: More Structures-(Deprecated)
description: Generates more of every Vanilla Structure
body:
With this mod installed and with the config set to anything more than 1, many more of all the vanilla structures will generate. 
And by more, I mean that at level 5 there is almost no ground in places. And the end is hard to fly through due to the cities.
For versions 1.20+ go to:  https://modrinth.com/mod/many-more-structures
